title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Announcements
text:
| 28/05/2025 | 31/05/2025 | |
| Notification issued by the Revenue Department vide No F.09(03)-REV/ACQ/VI/25 dated, 1st May, 2025 regarding public hearing | Notification issued by the Revenue Department vide No F.09(03)-REV/ACQ/VI/25 dated, 1st May, 2025 regarding public hearing with the land owners by the Social Impact Assessment Study Team in connection with, acquisition of land for construction of Double Lane elevated Flyover from Radhanagar Bus Stand to IGM Choumuhani (Dental College), West Tripura. | 01/05/2025 | 08/05/2025 | |
| Conversion of existing road from Lichubagan to Airport New Terminal Point into 4(four) lane under Sadar Sub-Division in West Tripura District. | Conversion of existing road from Lichubagan to Airport New Terminal Point into 4(four) lane under Sadar Sub-Division in West Tripura District. | 20/03/2025 | 30/04/2025 | |
| HEREAS, acquisition of land area measuring 0.400 acre in R. S. Plot No/Nos. as specified at “Annexure-A”, Class as specified at “Annexure-A”, in Khatian No / Nos. as specified at “Annexure-A | WHEREAS, acquisition of land area measuring 0.400 acre in R. S. Plot No/Nos. as specified at “Annexure-A”, Class as specified at “Annexure-A”, in Khatian No / Nos. as specified at “Annexure-A”, under Singarbil Sheet No. 2/P Mouja of Lankamura Tehsil under Sadar Sub-Division for the purpose of development of International Cricket Stadium at Narsingarh to be constructed/developed by the Hon. Secretary, Tripura Cricket Association, Agartala, West Tripura District is/are proposed. | 01/02/2025 | 07/02/2025 | |
| WHEREAS, acquisition of land area measuring 4.295 acres in R. S. Plot No / Nos. as specified at “Annexure-A”, Class as specified at “Annexure-A”, in Khatian No/Nos. as specified at “Annexure-A” | WHEREAS, acquisition of land area measuring 4.295 acres in R. S. Plot No / Nos. as specified at “Annexure-A”, Class as specified at “Annexure-A”, in Khatian No/Nos. as specified at “Annexure-A”, under Narsingarh Sheet No.
